title: Ethotho Ethotho Lyrics Ra Ra Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ethotho Ethotho     
Artist(s): Haricharan 
Lyricist: Na. Muthukumar 
Music: Srikanth Deva

Ethotho Ethotho Kanavai tharukindraai.
Ada ennule ennule kulapam tharukindrai
Ethotho Ethotho Kanavai tharukindraai.
Adi ennule ennule kulapam tharukindrai

Idhu natpa kadhala natpa kadhala
Suttrida vaikindrai
Adi rekkai indri rngo ennai
parandhida vaikindrai
Idhu natpa kadhala natpa kadhala
Suttrida vaikindrai
En vayadhil oram penne vandhu
Poochedi vaikindrai

Idhelloram idheloram hey eraalam 
vaarithaigal thondrum
Indrundhalum irundhaalu en
nenjodu nenjodu mounam

Ethotho Ethotho Kanavai tharukindraai.
Ada ennule ennule kulapam tharukindrai
Idhu natpa kadhala natpa kadhala
Suttrida vaikindrai
En vayadhil oram penne vandhu
Poochedi vaikindrai

THoorathil nindralum, pakkathil therikindrai
Pakkthil nindralo, thoorathil therikindrai
Nenjukul sila neram, thooralgal tharukindrai
Thooralgal thandhaalum, veppathai viduindrai

Enna solla penne idhu etho pudhu ekkam 
Kanna vittu pochu sila naala en thookam

Ethotho Ethotho Kanavai tharukindraai..   
Idhu natpa kadhala kadhala natpa ...

Veetukul indrundhalum, nenjukul nulaikindrai
Veliye naan ponaalum ulle ne varukindrai
Thaeniyin sootai pol, ullnenjil sudukinrai
Suttalum nenjukule thithipai tharukindrai

Vathikuchi pola, thalamela oru baaram
Natha kootai pola, sumanthene sila neram

Ethotho Ethotho Kanavai tharukindraai.
Ada ennule ennule kulapam tharukindrai
Idhu natpa kadhala kadhala natpa ...
Idhu natpa kadhala natpa kadhala ....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ethotho Ethotho'?

The song conveys feelings of love and affection, expressing the emotions associated with romantic relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Ra Ra'?

This song is featured in a romantic setting, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who is the singer of 'Ethotho Ethotho'?

The song is sung by the talented Haricharan, known for his melodious voice.

Who composed the music for 'Ethotho Ethotho'?

The music for this song was composed by Srikanth Deva, who is known for his catchy tunes.

When was 'Ethotho Ethotho' released?

The song was released on July 12, 2011, as part of the movie Ra Ra.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Ra Ra, the song Ethotho Ethotho serves as a heartfelt expression of love between the protagonists. The lyrics beautifully articulate the emotions of affection and connection, making it a memorable romantic number. With Haricharan's soulful rendition and Srikanth Deva's captivating composition, the song evokes feelings of joy and nostalgia. It perfectly encapsulates the essence of young love, making it a favorite among listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ethotho Ethotho from the movie Ra Ra is a delightful romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung beautifully by Haricharan, this song features enchanting lyrics by Na Muthukumar and captivating music by Srikanth Deva. Its soothing vibe makes it a perfect choice for celebrating love and special moments.
stanzaMeanings: You are giving me a vision. It brings chaos within me. You are giving me a vision. It brings chaos within me.

This is a friendship, a love friendship that is spinning around. It is lifting me up without wings. This is a friendship, a love friendship that is spinning around. A girl has come into my life and is blooming.
Everything is happening, all the events are unfolding. Even if it is here or there, my heart remains silent with my heart.
You are giving me a vision. It brings chaos within me. This is a friendship, a love friendship that is spinning around. A girl has come into my life and is blooming.
Even if I stand far away, I can feel you nearby. Even if I stand close, I can feel you far away. Sometimes in my heart, storms arise. Even if storms come, they will not leave the heat behind.
What should I say, girl? This is some new connection. I lost my sleep for a few days.
You are giving me a vision. This is a love friendship, a love friendship...
Even at home, my heart is tangled. Even if I go outside, you come back inside me. Like the sweetness of honey, it is stirring in my heart. Even if it spins, it brings a thrill to my heart.
Like a spinning top, there is a weight on the rhythm. Like a gathering of friends, sometimes it feels heavy.
You are giving me a vision. It brings chaos within me. This is a friendship, a love friendship... This is a friendship, a love friendship....
You are giving me a vision...
